description: Style Note These stylish formal trousers from arrow woman set themselves apart with great styling. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style them with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Product Details Black trousers, has a hooked clasp and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, two insert pockets in front below the waistband and two welt insert pockets at the back with buttoned closure Material and Care 64% polyester, 34% viscose and 2% lycra Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Line dry in shade Use cool iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 30 Style NoteThese stylish formal trousers from arrow Woman set themselves apart with great styling.
